notes: gnomad_LOEUF/pLI coverage 6874/6926; dep_mean_effect/dep_frac_dependent 6776/6926 (DepMap Chronos). Local project-derived file; upstream DepMap + gnomAD v2.1.1.
gnomad_mis_z (missense constraint z). 19658 unique genes; 46 duplicate symbols (15 in universe) deduped by max exp_mis then gene_id. Read from local bgz via gzip.

CORUM via master slice; features in_complex,n_complexes,complex_size,has_complex. 2850/6926 in a complex. CAVEAT: slice deduped to ONE complex per gene, so n_complexes capped at 1 (under-counts multi-complex membership). complex_size = count of universe genes sharing complex_id (local co-membership proxy, NOT true CORUM complex cardinality).

STRING v12.0 combined_score>=700, 94218 undirected edges. features degree,weighted_degree,betweenness. Betweenness approx k=500 seed=2, UNWEIGHTED hop-count (STRING weight is similarity not distance). 39 current HGNC symbols relabelled to universe old-symbols (e.g. AARS1->AARS, STING1->TMEM173); 3 histone variants left as out-of-universe nodes. 6353/6926 non-isolated; all 6926 assigned a value (0 for 573 isolated). CONTROL group: network topology previously found NOT to aid transmission.
Gene universe key on which all Track A tables are joined/ordered (col 'gene'=HGNC symbol). Not a feature source; listed for provenance completeness. Hashed for the manifest.

length, mol_weight from UniProt; isoelectric_point (Biopython IsoelectricPoint), gravy (mean Kyte-Doolittle), aggregation_propensity (max mean Kyte-Doolittle over sliding window w=7) computed from UniProt canonical sequence over 20 standard residues; tm_domain_count = count of TRANSMEM features; signal_peptide = presence of SIGNAL feature. All 6926 genes mapped to a reviewed accession. No CPTAC/tumour data used; external protein properties only.

vsl2_disorder, psipred_helix, psipred_strand, psipred_coil, asaquick_buried passed through unchanged from local master slice; 154 genes (2.2%) lack precomputed values -> NaN, not imputed. Sequence-based structure/disorder predictors on reference protein; no tumour data.

is_tf = GO:0003700 DNA-binding transcription factor activity in UniProt GO-MF (GO:0140110 not populated in UniProt go_f field, so conservative GO:0003700 used); is_kinase/is_receptor = 'kinase'/'receptor' in UniProt keywords; is_enzyme = EC number present OR enzyme-class keyword. go_mf_category = single broad GO molecular-function bucket via documented priority ladder (TF>catalytic>transducer>transporter>structural>regulator>binding>other); 710 genes (10.3%) have no GO-MF term -> NaN. Flags 100% covered. No tumour data used.

source_name: Ensembl BioMart (Ensembl Genes, GRCh38.p14, Ensembl release 116) feature page
notes: transcript_length (canonical transcript, incl UTRs+CDS) and n_isoforms (transcript_count). Canonical filter transcript_is_canonical=only. 10 genes with retired master-slice Ensembl IDs recovered via REST symbol lookup.

source_name: Ensembl BioMart (GRCh38.p14, Ensembl release 116) structure page
notes: utr5_length, utr3_length = summed 5'/3' UTR exon spans of canonical transcript. cds_length coordinate-sum validated ==BioMart CDS Length for 100% of genes.
gc_content = %GC of canonical CDS. codon_optimality = GC3 (percent GC at 3rd codon position of canonical CDS); named proxy, correlates with codon-usage optimality in human. NOT a tAI/CAI.

source_name: Ensembl Compara human-mouse aligned CDS + Nei-Gojobori (NG86) dN/dS (release 116)
notes: SELF-COMPUTED SUBSTITUTION: Ensembl's precomputed pairwise dn_ds field is deprecated (returns null in REST; dn/ds attributes removed from BioMart at release 88). dn_ds computed here as NG86 (Biopython Bio.codonalign.cal_dn_ds) on the Compara codon-aligned human-mouse 1:1 orthologue CDS; codons with gaps/N dropped, min 30 codons. Validated TP53=0.192. NaN for 566 non-1:1 or no-data genes.

phylop_mean UNAVAILABLE: per-gene remote bigWig random-access reads work single-threaded (~0.38s/gene, validated TP53 CDS-exon mean=2.11) but UCSC throttles/drops connections under thread concurrency (libcurl urlSeek errors, 0 rows). Single-thread full run est. 79 min exceeded the time budget. Left NaN for all genes (tried, not fabricated). Recompute route: download bigWig to local/remote-compute and extract over CDS exons.

source_name: Ensembl BioMart orthologue-depth panel, 6 species (GRCh38.p14, Ensembl release 116)
notes: gene_age_proxy = orthologue depth = count (0-6) of species with a 1:1/1:many orthologue among mouse, chicken, Xenopus tropicalis, zebrafish, Drosophila melanogaster, S. cerevisiae. Higher = older/deeper conservation. Proxy named; NOT a phylostratum age in Myr.

source_name: GTEx Portal API v2 medianGeneExpression (GTEx v8; reference/gene for gencodeId resolution)
notes: BORDERLINE: normal-tissue RNA (not tumour, not protein). Tested with and without downstream. Features per gene over 54 GTEx v8 tissues: n_tissues_expressed = count of tissues with median TPM >= 1; tau = Yanai 2005 tissue-specificity index on linear median TPM (0=ubiquitous, 1=tissue-specific; NaN if max TPM=0). Bulk GCT (GTEx_Analysis_2017-06-05_v8_RNASeQCv1.1.9_gene_median_tpm.gct.gz) is served only from storage.googleapis.com/{adult-gtex,gtex_analysis_v8}, both on the sandbox exfiltration denylist (cannot be granted); substituted the allowlisted GTEx Portal API v2 which returns identical GTEx v8 per-tissue median TPM. gencodeId resolved 6712 via ensembl_id, 211 via symbol fallback, 3 via symbol expression recovery (6712+211+3=6926); 5 genes (HYI, IGLL5, OVCA2, PGAM2, SFT2D3) absent from GTEx v8 expression -> NaN. Keyed on HGNC symbol via master_gene_slice ensembl_id. No CPTAC data used.

source_name: UNAVAILABLE (no reachable source on allowlisted hosts)
notes: UNAVAILABLE from already-allowlisted hosts without a new network grant (track-D fallback; request_network_access NOT called). PRIDE searched across 64 turnover-related projects: holds RAW/SEARCH/RESULT(37 files, 30 .mzid + 7 .mzid.gz)/annotation files only, no fitted per-protein half-life or kdeg results table. UniProt/Ensembl/GTEx carry no proteome-wide turnover field. Published human half-life tables (DOIs CrossRef-verified: Mathieson 2018 doi:10.1038/s41467-018-03106-1; McShane 2016 doi:10.1016/j.cell.2016.09.015; Li 2021 doi:10.1016/j.molcel.2021.09.015, which is the paper PRIDE PXD024513 cites in its /references field) are journal supplementary on non-allowlisted publisher hosts. Optional enrichment, not load-bearing. No half-lives fabricated. See g4_turnover_STATUS.txt.
